name: ky
why: small, single-purpose TypeScript package with a documented README.

name: scikit-learn
why: Python API over Cython/C++ extensions, plus a scientific-computing CI/build story.

name: googletest
why: canonical CMake-based C++ project with a Bazel BUILD file too.

name: express
profile: mature OSS repo with good docs
why: long-established Node project with an extensive documented history.

name: chalk
why: small, well-tested package that (as of corpus definition) has no AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md-style entrypoint.

name: bootstrap
why: ships large compiled CSS/JS bundles and browser-test fixtures alongside source.

name: cargo
why: many workflow files and custom test-runner orchestration rather than a single flat CI job.

name: agentready
why: dogfoods the scanner against its own repository; scanned in place, never cloned.
